name: Retrieve indexed documents with HTTP / REST API on autopilot

options.systemMessage: You answer document questions using only the retrieved knowledge-base context. If the context does not contain the answer, say so and set needsHuman=true.

parameters.toolDescription: Semantic search over the embeddings knowledge base. Always call this before answering factual document questions.

parameters.text: =тЬЕ Retrieve indexed documents with HTTP / REST API on autopilot тАФ run completed at {{ $now.toFormat('HH:mm') }}

parameters.content:
### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf06523-document`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Normalize Document Payload

### Normalize Document Payload

Custom JavaScript: Normalize incoming document records to a stable schema

Next: Answer from Knowledge Base

### Answer from Knowledge Base

The AI brain: reads the input, decides which attached tools to call (and in what order), then composes the answer.

Ports: тСатЖТ Grounded Answer Found? ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЪа failures exit via the error rail

### Anthropic Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Answer from Knowledge Base** as `languageModel`

ЁЯФС Anthropic API key

### Knowledge Base Retriever

Exposes the vector index to the agent as a semantic-search tool.

Feeds **Answer from Knowledge Base** as `tool`

ЁЯФС Pinecone API key

### Query Embeddings

Embedding model тАФ MUST be the same model for indexing and querying, or retrieval quality collapses.

Feeds **Knowledge Base Retriever** as `embedding`

ЁЯФС OpenAI API key

### Grounded Answer Found?

Two-way gate on `={{ !($json.output || '').includes('needsHuman') }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: тСатЖТ Return Answer (HTTP 200) ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Log Knowledge Gap

### Return Answer (HTTP 200)

Sends the HTTP 200 response back to the caller тАФ keep this fast; heavy work happens after/async.

Next: Guard Non-Empty title

### Log Knowledge Gap

Appends a new row to 'Document Tracker' тАФ a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: тСатЖТ Flag Gap to KB Owners ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

### Flag Gap to KB Owners

Posts a message to Slack (`#knowledge`) тАФ a low-latency way for the team to see automation activity without checking a dashboard.

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ ЁЯФС Slack OAuth2

nodes.name: Note: Flag Gap to KB Owners

parameters.content:
### Guard Non-Empty title

Drops items that fail the condition; only qualifying items continue (no false branch).

Next: Send Summary to Slack

### Send Summary to Slack

Posts a message to Slack (`#knowledge`) тАФ a low-latency way for the team to see automation activity without checking a dashboard.

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Slack OAuth2

### Capture Failure Context

Shapes the item: writes `failedNode`, `errorMessage`, `workflow`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Escalate Failure to Slack

### Escalate Failure to Slack

Posts a message to Slack (`#knowledge`) тАФ a low-latency way for the team to see automation activity without checking a dashboard.

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ ЁЯФС Slack OAuth2

# Retrieve indexed documents with HTTP / REST API on autopilot

**Pattern:** RAG Pipeline ┬╖ **Level:** Core ┬╖ **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Retrieve indexed documents with HTTP / REST API on autopilot. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual embeddings is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook тЖТ Normalize Document Payload тЖТ Answer from Knowledge Base тЖТ Grounded Answer Found? тЖТ Return Answer (HTTP 200) тЖТ Guard Non-Empty title тЖТ Send Summary to Slack

## Use it for
- Teams that want to rag pipeline without manual effort
- Anyone automating embeddings in ai
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Responds in seconds
- Runs 24/7 in the background
- Improves response time

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Anthropic API key; Google OAuth2 / service account; OpenAI API key; Pinecone API key; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: ЁЯЯж entry ┬╖ ЁЯЯк AI ┬╖ ЁЯЯл actions ┬╖ тмЬ utilities ┬╖ ЁЯЯй outputs ┬╖ ЁЯЯе error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath тАФ read those before editing.

## Try it now
Sample data is pinned on the trigger тАФ hit **Execute Workflow** to watch it flow through every node before connecting any real credentials. Unpin the trigger (right-click тЖТ Unpin) when you're ready to go live.

## Design decisions

Retrieval happens *inside* the agent as a callable tool, not as a mandatory step before it, so the agent decides when a lookup is actually worth the latency instead of always paying for one. The 'Grounded Answer Found?' gate treats an honest 'needsHuman' as a valid outcome, not a failure тАФ logging the gap so the knowledge base improves beats a confident hallucination.

## Practice exercises

Once it's wired up with real credentials, try:

1. Turn the reranker knob on and compare answer quality on a deliberately ambiguous question.
2. Swap the vector store provider тАФ only the vector store node changes, nothing else in the workflow.
3. Lower topK from 5 to 2 and see how much retrieved context the agent actually needed.

## ЁЯЫЯ Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3├Ч with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail тЖТ context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## ЁЯФР Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials тАФ never in node parameters.

## ЁЯдЦ AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens тАФ keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## ЁЯЫа Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see ЁЯФС lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your embeddings process. Every node card explains its role тАФ safe to extend at any marked branch.
